name: SocratiCode
description: Enterprise-grade (40m+ lines) codebase intelligence in a zero-setup, private and local Plugin/Skill or MCP: managed indexing, hybrid semantic search, polyglot code dependency graphs, cross-project/repo & branch-aware search, and DB/API/infra knowledge. Benchmark: 61% less tokens, 84% fewer calls, 37x faster than standard AI grep.
